Michael Anderson
Columbus, OH

Summary
Dedicated CDL-A Driver with over 2 years of experience in over-the-road (OTR) and regional transportation. Proven ability to ensure timely deliveries while adhering to safety regulations and maintaining a clean driving record. Strong work ethic and excellent customer service skills, with a focus on efficiency and reliability.

Experience

Roadrunner Transportation Services, Columbus, OH  
CDL-A Driver  
June 2021 - Present  
- Operated Class A trucks to transport goods across multiple states, covering over 150,000 miles annually.  
- Ensured compliance with DOT regulations, maintaining a clean MVR with no violations.  
- Conducted pre-trip and post-trip inspections, reporting any mechanical issues to maintain safety standards.  
- Delivered exceptional customer service, resolving delivery issues promptly and effectively.

Fast Track Logistics, Dayton, OH  
Regional Driver  
March 2020 - May 2021  
- Managed regional deliveries, transporting freight between Ohio and neighboring states.  
- Collaborated with dispatch to optimize routes, reducing delivery times by 15%.  
- Maintained accurate logs of hours driven and mileage, ensuring compliance with federal regulations.

Certifications
- Class A Commercial Driver's License (CDL)  
- DOT Medical Card  

Skills
- Strong knowledge of vehicle maintenance and safety protocols  
- Excellent navigational and route planning abilities  
- Proficient in using electronic logging devices (ELDs)  
- Exceptional time management and organizational skills  

Education

Columbus Technical College, Columbus, OH  
Certificate in Commercial Truck Driving  
Graduated: December 2019
